text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the St. Lite Kinen, precursor to the
Kikuka Sho. The day we've been waiting for since
spring has finally come.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho, your weight, Cafe... It's increased quite a lot
since spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But what do we have here? Heh-heh, there's
nothing supernatural about an increase so
tangible...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, deep down inside, my body feels...
different from before.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The strange squirming has gone away... and I feel
like... my body is truly mine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the impression we've weathered a very
strange storm...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If I can maintain this condition...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And overcome this next hurdle... Perhaps I could
take on the Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't answer right away. Too many aspects of
her health are still shrouded in mystery.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh, discussing the results of the experiment
before you've conducted it? What nonsense.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's just see how you do on the turf. I wonder
what color we can expect your litmus paper to
turn, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to believe it'll be a bright color. Today's
the day to break free from this unseen quagmire
bogging us down.
